|**_Decision Granting Request for_**<br><br>**_Prioritized Examination_**<br><br>**_(Track I or After RCE)_**|Application No.:19/182,905|
|The paper, filed May 7, 2025, is being considered as a petition filed under 37 CFR 1.181 requesting reconsideration of the decision issued May 6, 2025 and is GRANTED. The original request for prioritized examination, filed April 18, 2025, is hereby accepted in view of the properly filed request for prioritized examination submitted on May 7, 2025.<br><br>1. THE REQUEST FILED April 18, 2025 IS **GRANTED.**<br><br>The above-identified application has met the requirements for prioritized examination<br><br>1. for an original nonprovisional application (Track I).<br>2. for an application undergoing continued examination (RCE).<br>3. **The above-identified application will undergo prioritized examination.** The application will be accorded special status throughout its entire course of prosecution until one of the following occurs:<br>    1. filing a **petition for extension of time** to extend the time period for filing a reply;<br>    2. filing an **amendment to amend the application to contain more than four independent claims, more than thirty total claims**, or a multiple dependent claim;<br>    3. filing a **request for continued examination**;<br>    4. filing a notice of appeal;<br>    5. filing a request for suspension of action;<br>    6. mailing of a notice of allowance;<br>    7. mailing of a final Office action;<br>    8. completion of examination as defined in 37 CFR 41.102; or<br>    9. abandonment of the application.<br><br>Telephone inquiries with regard to this decision should be directed to Vanitha Elgart at 571-272-7395.<br><br>/VANITHA M ELGART/  <br>Petitions Examiner, OPET|   |

U.S. Patent and Trademark Office

PTO-2298 (Rev. 02-2012)
